prompt: Create a stunning photorealistic cinematic vertical portrait of a beautiful young Indian woman standing on an ornate carved stone balcony at night, shown from the back and three-quarter side as she leans gracefully on a dark wooden railing and gazes upward toward a huge bright full moon. She has very long flowing wavy black hair swept dramatically by the wind, fair warm skin, bare shoulders, and a slim elegant figure. Her face is intentionally anonymized with a soft rectangular skin-toned blur covering the facial features. She wears a sleeveless white-to-purple ombre gradient evening dress with thin straps, a low open back, a fitted purple bodice, delicate silver and floral embroidery, and a flowing pleated skirt fading from ivory to deep violet. Frame the scene with intricate Mughal/Rajasthani-style carved stone arches and columns, with a warm glowing lantern on the upper left and decorative balcony details in the foreground. In the background, show a deep dark blue starry sky with scattered clouds, a luminous oversized full moon near the upper right, and a distant city skyline with golden bokeh lights and a domed tower. Use warm lantern light from the side mixed with cool dramatic moonlight rim lighting on the hair and shoulders, shallow depth of field, highly detailed fabric and stone carving, serene romantic atmosphere, ultra-realistic skin and hair texture, cinematic color grading, 8k resolution, vertical 9:16 composition.
